text:
ふん、目的を果たしたか。
だがこんなものは、小手調べにすぎん。
いずれ、より大きな覚悟が必要となる。

憶えておけ。
ファントムは、いついかなる時も
目的を必ず果たす。

例え、何を犠牲にしようとも、だ。
お前が《亡霊》でいるつもりならば
心に刻ん

So you've done it, have you? But this
was only a test, after all. You still need
to prove to me that you will offer up
your entirety to this.

Remember this: a Phantom sees their
mission through to the end. No matter
the circumstance. No matter the cost.

Whatever sacrifices must be made will be.
If you truly wish to become a Phantom,
this shall become your very creed.
